title: Roasted Italian Pecorino Caponata
description: A lacto-vegetarian-friendly, Italian-inspired dish featuring roasted vegetables and crumbly pecorino cheese. Perfect for meal prep and enjoyed with crusty bread or in a stone bowl.
instructions: Toss the eggplant, onion, bell pepper, and garlic with olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and lightly browned.
Remove the vegetables from the oven and stir in the Taleggio cheese until melted.
Stir in the Pecorino cheese until crumbly and well combined.
Season with basil and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the caponata to a stone bowl or serving dish and serve warm.
Cover and refrigerate for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months for meal prep.
To serve, reheat the caponata in the microwave or oven until warmed through and crumbly.
